languages.text: {n}Когитатор погружается в глубокие размышления, охладители напряженно жужжат. Спустя несколько минут ожидания вид-скрин мигает и услужливо раскрывает перед вами перечень из нескольких записей, доступ к которым не запрашивали столетиями.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Когитатор погружается в глубокие размышления, охладители напряженно жужжат. Спустя несколько минут ожидания вид-скрин мигает и услужливо раскрывает перед вами перечень из нескольких записей, доступ к которым не запрашивали столетиями.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The cogitator falls deep in thought, its cooling systems buzzing tensely. After a few minutes of keeping you waiting, the vid-screen blinks and it dutifully presents you with a list of several journal entries that have not been accessed in centuries.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Когитатор погружается в глубокие размышления, охладители напряженно жужжат. Спустя несколько минут ожидания вид-скрин мигает и услужливо раскрывает перед вами перечень из нескольких записей, доступ к которым не запрашивали столетиями.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The cogitator is lost deep in thought, its cooling circuits buzzing tensely. After several minutes of keeping you waiting, the vid-screen blinks and dutifully presents you with a list of several journal entries that have not been accessed in centuries.{/n}

languages.text: {n}沉思者陷入深思，其冷却系统急促地嗡嗡作响。在你等了几分钟后，视讯屏幕闪了闪，尽责地为你列出了一份数个世纪都无人查阅的日志条目清单。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The cogitator falls deep in thought, its cooling systems buzzing tensely. After a few minutes of keeping you waiting, the vid-screen blinks and it dutifully presents you with a list of several journal entries that have not been accessed in centuries.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}沉思者陷入深思，其冷却系统急促地嗡嗡作响。在你等了几分钟后，视讯屏幕闪了闪，尽责地为你列出了一份数个世纪都无人查阅的日志条目清单。{/n}

languages.text: {n}El cogitador guarda un largo silencio y sus sistemas de refrigeración zumban, tensos. Tras varios minutos de espera, su pantalla se ilumina y muestra una lista de entradas de diario a las que nadie ha accedido en siglos.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The cogitator falls deep in thought, its cooling systems buzzing tensely. After a few minutes of keeping you waiting, the vid-screen blinks and it dutifully presents you with a list of several journal entries that have not been accessed in centuries.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El cogitador guarda un largo silencio y sus sistemas de refrigeración zumban, tensos. Tras varios minutos de espera, su pantalla se ilumina y muestra una lista de entradas de diario a las que nadie ha accedido en siglos.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le cogitateur plonge dans une profonde réflexion, comme en témoignent les vibrations affairées de ses systèmes de refroidissement. Après quelques minutes d'attente, l'écran clignote et vous présente obligeamment une série d'entrées de journal qui n'ont pas été consultées depuis des siècles.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The cogitator falls deep in thought, its cooling systems buzzing tensely. After a few minutes of keeping you waiting, the vid-screen blinks and it dutifully presents you with a list of several journal entries that have not been accessed in centuries.{/n}

Après quelques minutes d'attente, l'écran clignote et vous présente obligeamment une série d'entrées de journal qui n'ont pas été consultées depuis des siècles.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kavramsayar derin düşüncelere dalıyor, soğutma sistemleri gergin bir şekilde vızıldıyor. Seni birkaç dakika beklettikten sonra video ekranı yanıp sönüyor ve yüzyıllardır erişilmeyen birkaç girdiyi liste hâlinde, görev bilinciyle sana sunuyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The cogitator falls deep in thought, its cooling systems buzzing tensely. After a few minutes of keeping you waiting, the vid-screen blinks and it dutifully presents you with a list of several journal entries that have not been accessed in centuries.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Kavramsayar derin düşüncelere dalıyor, soğutma sistemleri gergin bir şekilde vızıldıyor. Seni birkaç dakika beklettikten sonra video ekranı yanıp sönüyor ve yüzyıllardır erişilmeyen birkaç girdiyi liste hâlinde, görev bilinciyle sana sunuyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Cogitator versinkt in Gedanken. Seine Kühlsysteme summen hörbar. Nachdem er dich einige Minuten hat warten lassen, blinkt sein Vid-Bildschirm und präsentiert dir pflichtbewusst eine Liste mit Tagebucheinträgen, die seit Jahrhunderten nicht abgerufen wurden.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The cogitator falls deep in thought, its cooling systems buzzing tensely. After a few minutes of keeping you waiting, the vid-screen blinks and it dutifully presents you with a list of several journal entries that have not been accessed in centuries.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Cogitator versinkt in Gedanken. Seine Kühlsysteme summen hörbar. Nachdem er dich einige Minuten hat warten lassen, blinkt sein Vid-Bildschirm und präsentiert dir pflichtbewusst eine Liste mit Tagebucheinträgen, die seit Jahrhunderten nicht abgerufen wurden.{/n}

languages.text: {n}コギテーターは深い思案に沈み、その冷却システムが緊張したように唸る。数分あなたを待たせたのち、ヴィッドスクリーンが瞬き、それは忠実にも、幾世紀ものあいだアクセスされてこなかった、いくつかの日誌記録の一覧をあなたに提示する。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The cogitator falls deep in thought, its cooling systems buzzing tensely. After a few minutes of keeping you waiting, the vid-screen blinks and it dutifully presents you with a list of several journal entries that have not been accessed in centuries.{/n}
